title: After Delhi court denies a stay, the Central government takes over Jaipur Polo Ground
description: A Delhi court on Friday refused to stop the Central government from taking over the Jaipur Polo Ground in Lutyens Delhi which the Indian Polo Association manages. Vacation Judge Dhirendra Rana of the Patiala House Court said that he was not inclined to stay the execution of the eviction order issued by the government on May 20.
